strudel_code: note("d a b:minor f# g d g a").sound("gm_violin").room(0.5).gain(2).adsr(".2:.8:.8:.2")
C:major A2:minor D:dorian G:mixolydian A2:minor:pentatonic F:major:pentatonic

@ = prolong
$: = stack
_$: = mute that part of a stack
~ = skip note
/2 = slow down
<> = alternate
! = replicate

setcpm(130/4)

const drums = stack(
  sound("bd*4").bank("RolandTR909").gain(1),
  //sound("~ cp ~ cp").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.9),
  sound("hh*8 [cp cp]").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.5).pan(sine.range(0.3,0.7))
)

const bass = note("<c2 c2 c2 [c2 eb2]>*4")
  .sound("sawtooth")
  .lpf(600)
  .sustain(0.15)
  .gain(0.7)
  .struct("t*8")

const stabs = note("<[c3,eb3,g3,bb3] [eb3,g3,bb3,d4] [ab2,c3,eb3,g3] [g2,bb2,d3,f3]>")
  .sound("sawtooth")
  .lpf(1200)
  .attack(0.01)
  .decay(0.2)
  .sustain(0.4)
  .release(0.3)
  .gain(0.6)
  .struct("~ t ~ t ~ t ~ t")

cat(
  stack(bass, drums, stabs)
)
